briefings.headline: CRUDE RUNS 6%, CORN SPLITS WIDEN, BEANS FIRM
briefings.teaser: Crude ran nearly 6% on Trump's Iran blockade, harvest diesel just got more expensive overnight.

briefings.headline: HOGS RUN 11%, HORMUZ FLARES AGAIN, CROP PROGRESS DUE
briefings.teaser: Hogs ran 11%, Iran flared again, and corn's nearby/December gap is the crop confidence trade in real time.

briefings.headline: WEEK AHEAD: POLLINATION WEATHER, WASDE AFTERMATH SET STAGE
briefings.teaser: Hogs had their biggest weekly swing in months; corn's December premium is the weather market's live ticker.

briefings.headline: WHEAT RUNS, HOGS REVERSE: WEEK ENDS HOT
briefings.teaser: Hogs up 10.8%, corn down 3.2%, wheat holding the WASDE: the grain complex is fracturing and livestock just gave you two days of noise.

briefings.headline: WASDE DAY: WHEAT RUNS 3%, HOGS REVERSE HARD
briefings.teaser: WASDE lit the complex; wheat ran 3%, hogs reversed 15%, and corn finally got off the mat.

briefings.headline: HOGS FALL HARD; EXPORT SALES DECIDE BEANS
briefings.teaser: Hogs fell nearly 12% today. Export sales at 7:30 AM decide the rest.

briefings.headline: CRUDE RUNS 3% AS HORMUZ REIGNITES
briefings.teaser: Iran hits commercial vessels, tankers reverse course, and crude runs 3.2%. The energy premium is back.

briefings.headline: BEANS LEAD THE COMPLEX BACK NORTH
briefings.teaser: Beans ran hard on acreage confirmation. Corn and wheat followed. Cattle barely blinked.

briefings.headline: CORN BREAKS 4% AGAIN; OATS BREAKDOWN 15%
briefings.teaser: Corn back at $4.25, oats down 15%, and Crop Progress drops at 3 PM CT. The market is coiled.

briefings.headline: CORN POLLS INTO JULY 4 WEEKEND AT $4.25
briefings.teaser: Corn broke 4% into the holiday. Now pollination decides whether that was right.

briefings.headline: CORN BREAKS 4%; WEEK ENDS ON DEFENSIVE NOTE
briefings.teaser: Corn's biggest daily drop in weeks hit Friday; livestock and hogs followed. Energy and gold told the opposite story.

briefings.headline: CORN BREAKS 4% ON HOLIDAY EVE; OATS HIT -15%
briefings.teaser: Corn's biggest drop in months landed the day before July 4th and right on top of pollination. Monday answers whether that made sense.

briefings.headline: HEAT OWNS THE BELT; EXPORT SALES ARRIVE AT 7:30
briefings.teaser: Heat premium held Wednesday; export sales at 7:30 either confirm the China story or kill it.

briefings.headline: ACREAGE VERDICT: CORN HOLDS, BEANS SLIP
briefings.teaser: Acreage report digested, Belt heating up fast. The next corn move is weather, not data.

briefings.headline: ACREAGE DATA LANDS; CORN HOLDS $4.04
briefings.teaser: USDA answered the acre question at 11 AM; now the heat wave sets the next one.

briefings.headline: ACREAGE REPORT DAY: GRAINS BREAK, SOYOIL RUNS
briefings.teaser: Corn breaks hard into the Acreage report, soyoil runs 7%, and the Hormuz premium is back.

briefings.headline: ACREAGE REPORT TUESDAY; CORN BREAKS HARD INTO IT
briefings.teaser: Corn broke 2.5% into Friday's close. Tuesday's Acreage print decides if $4.13 is a floor or a ceiling.

briefings.headline: CORN AND WHEAT CLOSE WEAK; SOYOIL RUNS HARD
briefings.teaser: Grains sold off hard Friday but soyoil told a different story. Here is what the split means heading into the most data-heavy week of summer.

briefings.headline: ACREAGE REPORT TUESDAY; OATS HIT HARD AGAIN
briefings.teaser: Oats down 13%, heat incoming, Acreage report Tuesday: the quiet Friday hides a loud week ahead.

briefings.headline: EXPORT SALES REPORT DUE; CORN STABILIZES AFTER 6% BREAK
briefings.teaser: Corn steadies post-break with export sales due; oats fall sharply 10% overnight on no clear catalyst.

briefings.headline: CORN NEARBY BREAKS 6%; OLD-CROP CARRY INVERTS
briefings.teaser: Nearby corn fell 27 cents while Dec barely moved. The carry structure just told you something important about storage.

briefings.headline: WHEAT LEADS LOWER; FARM BILL DRAFT DROPS
briefings.teaser: Wheat fell nearly 10 cents, the farm bill draft hit the wire, and cattle are still waiting on the packer.

briefings.headline: CORN FALLS 7%; CROP PROGRESS DUE AT 3 PM
briefings.teaser: Corn just had its biggest single-session drop in months. December barely moved. Something's off.

briefings.headline: BEANS AND WHEAT BROKE FRIDAY; CATTLE HELD
briefings.teaser: Grains sold off into the weekend while cattle defied the lockout. Monday resets everything.

briefings.headline: GRAINS BREAK, CATTLE HOLDS, WEEK RESET AHEAD
briefings.teaser: Beans broke $0.24 Friday, cattle ran 2.3%, and crude firmed heading into a three-day weekend.

briefings.headline: CATTLE ON FEED DELIVERS; GRAINS BREAK INTO HOLIDAY
briefings.teaser: Live cattle ran hard on a bullish Cattle on Feed; beans broke lower into the long weekend.

briefings.headline: SOYBEAN OIL BREAKS HARD, EXPORT SALES DUE 7:30
briefings.teaser: Soy oil had its biggest drop in months. Export sales hit at 7:30. Position accordingly.

briefings.headline: CATTLE RUNS HARD, WHEAT HOLDS, CORN FIRMS
briefings.teaser: Cattle runs 2.4%, wheat holds its gains, and the ECB is staring down another severe weather round.

briefings.headline: WHEAT RUNS 4%, CRUDE DROPS HARD ON IRAN DEAL
briefings.teaser: Wheat's biggest day in months, crude's worst day in weeks, and Iowa crop conditions just quietly slipped.

briefings.headline: SOYBEANS LEAD HIGHER, CATTLE SLIPS ON SCREWWORM RESTRICTIONS
briefings.teaser: Beans rally on easing input costs but cattle drops on screwworm trade restrictions.

briefings.headline: CATTLE HOLDS GAINS, CORN STEADIES AHEAD OF KEY WEEK
briefings.teaser: Live cattle's 3% weekly gain has legs, while corn steadies before Tuesday's USDA test.

briefings.headline: CATTLE BOUNCES BACK, GRAINS FIND FOOTING AFTER WEEK OF SLIDES
briefings.teaser: Cattle's 3% Friday bounce suggests processing fears overdone, while corn steadies despite disease pressure.

briefings.headline: GRAINS FIND BOTTOM, LIVESTOCK SLIPS ON USDA SUPPLY VIEW
briefings.teaser: Grain complex breaks five-day slide as corn finds floor at $4.13.

briefings.headline: GRAINS SLIP AHEAD OF WASDE, CATTLE HOLD GAINS
briefings.teaser: Corn slides 4 cents pre-WASDE while cattle steady on screwworm confirmation removing market uncertainty.

briefings.headline: CATTLE BOUNCE SHARP, MILK LEADS COMPLEX HIGHER
briefings.teaser: Live cattle post biggest bounce in two weeks as processing fears ease slightly.

briefings.headline: GRAINS TICK HIGHER, LIVESTOCK FALLS ON SCREWWORM FEARS
briefings.teaser: Screwworm spreads beyond Texas, livestock complex breaks lower while grains find modest footing.

briefings.headline: WHEAT LEADS GRAINS HIGHER, MILK FALLS SHARPLY
briefings.teaser: Wheat breaks the losing streak, but milk's fall tells the processing story.

briefings.headline: BEANS BREAK $11 SUPPORT, HOGS FALL SHARPLY
briefings.teaser: Soybeans break three-week support as fund liquidation spreads from energy into agriculture.

briefings.headline: HOGS FALL 7.2%, CATTLE HOLDS GAINS
briefings.teaser: Hogs had their worst day in weeks while cattle held Friday's bounce.

briefings.headline: GRAINS FINISH FOUR-DAY SLIDE, METALS FALL SHARPLY
briefings.teaser: Four-day grain slide concludes as fund liquidation overwhelms weather support.

briefings.headline: CATTLE COMPLEX FLIPS HIGHER, GRAINS EXTEND SLIDE
briefings.teaser: Cattle complex gains while grain liquidation enters day four.

briefings.headline: GRAINS DRIFT LOWER, MILK GAINS OVERNIGHT
briefings.teaser: Corn extends three-session slide while milk posts biggest overnight move in weeks.

briefings.headline: GRAINS GRIND LOWER, CRUDE HOLDS IRAN GAINS
briefings.teaser: Grain funds keep liquidating while crude holds yesterday's Iran premium.

briefings.headline: CRUDE EXPLODES 5% ON IRAN CLOSURE THREAT
briefings.teaser: Energy explodes on Iran threats while grain funds keep booking Memorial profits.

briefings.headline: FUNDS LIQUIDATE INTO JUNE, CATTLE DIVERGE
briefings.teaser: Memorial liquidation hits grains as cattle hold firm into grilling season.

briefings.headline: GRAINS CLOSE WORST WEEK IN MONTH
briefings.teaser: Funds closed the books on a profitable May exactly when they should have.

briefings.headline: GRAINS SHED WEEK'S GAINS, MILK CRASHES 3%
briefings.teaser: Grains give back the week as funds cash out ahead of Memorial Day.

briefings.headline: MILK SPIKES 2.2%, CRUDE CRASHES OVERNIGHT
briefings.teaser: Dairy explodes higher while energy craters on geopolitical shifts.

briefings.headline: CATTLE RALLY TOGETHER, SILVER SLIDES 2.6%
briefings.teaser: Cattle rally together while silver slides on dollar strength.

briefings.headline: CATTLE CLIMB TOGETHER, OIL CRASHES 3.6%
briefings.teaser: Cattle complex narrows for first time in a week while oil craters on Iran strikes.

briefings.headline: CATTLE REVERSE FRIDAY'S CRASH, HOGS DIVE 4%
briefings.teaser: Cattle complex reverses Friday's crash but splits wider on no clear catalyst.

briefings.headline: CATTLE SPLIT WIDENS, GRAINS HOLD GAINS INTO HOLIDAY
briefings.teaser: Cattle market splits wide on processing math while grains mark time before Memorial Day.

briefings.headline: CATTLE SURGE 3.8%, GRAINS STEADY INTO HOLIDAY
briefings.teaser: Cattle surge while grains mark time heading into the long weekend.

briefings.headline: CATTLE CRASH 2%, GRAINS INCH HIGHER
briefings.teaser: Cattle crash on Cargill lockout while grains find quiet buying interest.

briefings.headline: CORN GAINS, FEEDERS DROP ON CARGILL LOCKOUT
briefings.teaser: Corn finds 2-cent bounce while Cargill lockout hammers feeders.

briefings.headline: WHEAT RALLIES 87 CENTS, FEEDERS SPIKE 1.4%
briefings.teaser: Wheat leads the charge as China's ag commitment spreads beyond corn and beans.

briefings.headline: GRAINS FLAT AS CHINA PROMISE FADES
briefings.teaser: Grains hold yesterday's China bounce but funds want proof, not promises.

briefings.headline: CORN JUMPS TO $4.72 AS CHINA COMMITS $17 BILLION
briefings.teaser: China's trade deal flips the grain narrative just as crude crashes on Russian sanctions.

briefings.headline: CORN SITS AT $4.56 AFTER FRIDAY'S FUND EXODUS
briefings.teaser: Corn funds fled Friday, leaving commercials to set the pace for a critical planting week.

briefings.headline: CORN CRATERS TO $4.56 AS FUNDS FLEE
briefings.teaser: Corn crashes through $4.60 as planting delays end and funds rotate out of weather premium.

briefings.headline: CORN BREAKS BELOW $4.65 AS PLANTING HITS TARGET
briefings.teaser: Funds dump grain positions as corn planting exceeds expectations.

briefings.headline: HOGS SURGE THREE PERCENT AS GRAINS FADE
briefings.teaser: Hogs explode higher while grains drift as livestock drives commodity action.

briefings.headline: CATTLE CRATER WHILE GRAINS MARK TIME
briefings.teaser: Cattle crash continues while corn holds the line in a split-personality session.

briefings.headline: HOGS EXPLODE SIX PERCENT AS CATTLE CRATER
briefings.teaser: Hogs exploded 6% overnight while cattle broke three-week support at $245.

briefings.headline: SILVER EXPLODES SIX PERCENT AS GRAINS DRIFT
briefings.teaser: Metals surge while grain complex waits for weather catalyst ahead of critical planting week.

briefings.headline: GRAINS RALLY SETS UP PLANTING WEEK SHOWDOWN
briefings.teaser: Friday's grain rally sets up a Memorial Day week where the calendar decides if this bounce has legs.

briefings.headline: HOGS CRASH NINE PERCENT AS FEEDERS FLIP SCRIPT
briefings.teaser: Hogs crater while feeders turn green in a week that split the livestock story.

briefings.headline: CATTLE CRASH THROUGH $250 FLOOR ON FEEDER BREAKDOWN
briefings.teaser: Both cattle complexes broke key support as energy costs crater and beef demand softens.

briefings.headline: CATTLE HOLD $253 AS OIL CRASH EASES INPUT COSTS
briefings.teaser: Cattle hold support as oil crash cuts input pressure and feeders stay strong.

briefings.headline: CATTLE SURGE PAST $252 AS CRUDE CRASHES
briefings.teaser: When the laggard leads, everything changes.

briefings.headline: CATTLE HOLD $251 AS MARKETS MARK TIME
briefings.teaser: Cattle found buyers above $251 but the breakdown story isn't over.

briefings.headline: CATTLE BREAK $252 AS OIL SURGES 3%
briefings.teaser: Cattle crash through key support while oil spikes 3% on supply fears.

briefings.headline: WEEK AHEAD: CATTLE TEST $250 FLOOR
briefings.teaser: The livestock correction puts cattle's month-long rally to the test at a critical technical level.

briefings.headline: HOGS CRASH 9% AS CATTLE BREAKOUT STALLS
briefings.teaser: Hogs crashed 9% while cattle's breakout faces its first real test.

briefings.headline: CATTLE FADE AS GRAINS MARK TIME
briefings.teaser: Cattle test breakout support while grains wait for planting data to drive direction.

briefings.headline: CRUDE CRASHES AS CATTLE HOLD GAINS
briefings.teaser: Crude crashes 4.4% but cattle hold the breakout — funds picking their spots.

briefings.headline: CATTLE HIT 52-WEEK HIGH AS CRUDE EXPLODES
briefings.teaser: Cattle reach new highs while crude oil's 4% surge reshuffles the cost structure for spring planting.

briefings.headline: CATTLE BREAK THROUGH AS CRUDE SURGES
briefings.teaser: Cattle trigger yesterday's call while crude drags grains higher.

briefings.headline: GRAINS FLATLINE AS PLANTING WINDOW TIGHTENS
briefings.teaser: Quiet grain trade masks growing planting urgency across the Corn Belt.

briefings.headline: MIXED SIGNALS AHEAD OF CRITICAL PLANTING WEEK
briefings.teaser: Weather takes the wheel as planting deadlines loom and markets show divergent signals.

briefings.headline: PLANTING PRESSURE BUILDS AS GRAINS SLIDE
briefings.teaser: Grain weakness meets cattle strength as planting window tightens across the Corn Belt.

briefings.headline: MILK CRASHES 6% AS GRAINS INCH HIGHER
briefings.teaser: Milk margins crater while grain bulls run out of steam.

briefings.headline: NATURAL GAS SPIKES AS GRAINS HOLD STEADY
briefings.teaser: Gas spikes 5.5% while corn and beans treade water in planting season doldrums.

briefings.headline: GRAINS DRIFT AS PLANTING PRESSURE MOUNTS
briefings.teaser: Quiet session masks growing planting urgency as optimal window narrows.

briefings.headline: CORN HOLDS GAINS AS BEANS EDGE HIGHER
briefings.teaser: Grain markets consolidate gains while cattle producers feel the squeeze.

briefings.headline: CORN JUMPS ON PLANTING CONCERNS
briefings.teaser: Corn jumps 8.5 cents as planting window tightens and energy costs spike.

briefings.headline: MIXED WEEK SETS STAGE FOR WEATHER WATCH
briefings.teaser: Grains split as weather watch begins for the week ahead.

briefings.headline: GRAINS CAP CHOPPY WEEK AS PLANTING ACCELERATES
briefings.teaser: Grain futures ease as planting picks up pace, but livestock tells a different story.

briefings.headline: GRAINS DRIFT LOWER AS PLANTING PICKS UP
briefings.teaser: Quiet drift lower in grains as planting season builds momentum — but weather still holds the cards.

briefings.headline: MILK CRASHES 5% AS GRAINS STAY STEADY
briefings.teaser: Dairy's overnight crash overshadows steady grain trade as planting season accelerates.

briefings.headline: GRAINS INCH HIGHER AS PLANTING BEGINS
briefings.teaser: Grains drift higher as planting begins, but dairy takes a 5% hit overnight.

briefings.headline: GRAINS DRIFT AS PLANTING WINDOW OPENS
briefings.teaser: Planting season begins with markets in wait-and-see mode.

briefings.headline: CORN HOLDS STEADY AS PLANTING PRESSURE BUILDS
briefings.teaser: Corn steady at $4.44 as critical planting week begins — weather about to take the wheel.

briefings.headline: WEATHER FOCUS AS PLANTING WEEK BEGINS
briefings.teaser: Critical planting week ahead with weather holding all the cards.

briefings.headline: GRAINS MIXED AS PLANTING PRESSURE BUILDS
briefings.teaser: Mixed signals from the grain pits as planting season anxiety takes hold.

briefings.headline: GRAINS STEADY AS PLANTING WINDOW OPENS
briefings.teaser: Calm before the planting storm — weather about to take the wheel.

briefings.headline: STOCKS SURGE AS GRAINS INCH HIGHER
briefings.teaser: Modest grain gains overshadowed by surging stocks as planting season looms.

briefings.headline: CRUDE OIL DROPS 3% AS GRAINS DRIFT
briefings.teaser: Oil's 3% drop creates diesel opportunity as grains hold steady into planting season.

briefings.headline: LEAN HOGS SURGE 3% ON TIGHT SUPPLIES
briefings.teaser: Hog futures explode higher while grains tread water ahead of planting push.

briefings.headline: GRAINS GAIN GROUND AS PLANTING WINDOW OPENS
briefings.teaser: Grains bounce back as planting season countdown begins — every day matters now.

briefings.headline: ENERGY RALLY PAUSES — GRAINS READY FOR MONDAY TEST
briefings.teaser: Energy costs stabilize but grain weakness demands attention as planting season heats up.

briefings.headline: CRUDE EXPLODES 7% — GRAINS SLIP ON PROFIT-TAKING
briefings.teaser: Energy costs explode while grains pause — timing couldn't be worse for planting season.

briefings.headline: HOGS EXPLODE 22% AS WHEAT DROPS 22¢
briefings.teaser: Historic hog rally meets grain weakness as planting season approaches.

briefings.headline: CATTLE SURGE 4.2% IGNITES BROAD RALLY
briefings.teaser: Cattle surge ignites commodity rally as planting season begins.

briefings.headline: CORN SLIDES 8¢ AS CRUDE JUMPS 3%
briefings.teaser: Corn down 8¢, crude up 3% — the margin squeeze is real as planting season opens.

briefings.headline: CRUDE EXPLODES ABOVE $101, GRAINS SLIDE
briefings.teaser: Crude oil's 8% overnight spike hits just as spring fieldwork begins.

briefings.headline: QUIET FRIDAY KEEPS GRAINS STEADY
briefings.teaser: Grains drift sideways while input costs climb — the pre-planting pause continues.

briefings.headline: GRAINS RALLY AHEAD OF PLANTING REPORT
briefings.teaser: Pre-plant rally builds as energy costs spike and USDA acreage report looms.

briefings.teaser: Silver exploded 7.1% while corn barely moved — here's what it means for your operation.

briefings.headline: CRUDE OIL CRATERS 10% — GRAIN COMPLEX FOLLOWS
briefings.teaser: Energy markets imploded overnight — here's what it means for your spring planting budget.

briefings.headline: GOLD CRASHES HARDEST IN YEARS
briefings.teaser: Gold crashes hardest in years while crude spikes — here's what it means for your input costs.

briefings.headline: MEAL ROCKETS 2.3% ON CHINESE CRUSH DEMAND
briefings.teaser: Meal rockets on Chinese demand while metals crash — here's what it means for your marketing.

briefings.teaser: Energy explosion overnight sends ripples through grain complex as input costs spike.

briefings.teaser: Hogs explode on disease fears while wheat gets hammered by Black Sea competition.

briefings.teaser: Overnight chaos flips the feed cost equation as hogs explode and beans crater.

briefings.headline: CRUDE SPIKES 4%, MILK EXPLODES 7% OVERNIGHT
briefings.teaser: Energy costs surge as planting season arrives — but dairy's massive move changes everything.

briefings.teaser: Stock market carnage sends safe-haven money hunting for real assets.

briefings.teaser: Oil's biggest overnight move in months changes the spring planting equation.

briefings.teaser: Hog rally creates ripple effects across feed grains while dairy faces harsh reality check.

briefings.teaser: Oil's historic crash triggers broad grain selloff — but lower input costs create silver lining.

briefings.teaser: Corn's biggest overnight move in weeks has traders asking if spring planting delays are already baked in.

briefings.teaser: Cattle rally sparks feed cost questions while grain markets search for direction.
